Off Calendar Feb-18-2020 Off Calendar

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-02-2020 Continued To Mar-10-20 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Plaintiff'S Motion For Prove Up Hearing In Support Of Application For Default Judgment Against Defendants Kihagi And Nozari 2 Llc
Off Calendar Dec-31-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendants Anna Kihagi, a/k/a Anna Swain, and Nozari 2 LLC.
Dept. 514. Judge: Gail Dekreon. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Reporter: Michael Shintaku, CSR #8251. Telephone: 408-410-8090. Email: emailformike@hotmail.com.

Nancy M. Conway, Esq. appeared with plaintiff Ashlee Duprey, who was placed under oath and testified.
David Rodriguez and Dennis Roybal, witnesses for plaintiff, were placed under oath and tstified.
After voir dire by the Court, Dennis Roybal is deemed an expert in the field of Fair Market Rental Value for San Francisco Apartments.
No appearance by defendants Anna Kihagi, a/k/a Anna Swain, or Nozari 2 LLC.
Plaintiff's complaint for Breach of Business & Professions Code Section 17200 and San Francisco Administrative Code Section 37.10B was filed on December 5, 2016.
Defendants Anna Kihagi, a/k/a Anna Swain, and Nozari 2 LLC were served via Certified Mail on October 9, 2018.
Default as to defendants Anna Kihagi, a/k/a Anna Swan, and Nozari 2 LLC was entered on February 20, 2019.
Statement of Damages for each defendant was served via Certified Mail on December 27, 2018 and filed with the Clerk's Office of December 5, 2019.
DOE defendants were dismissed today, December 31, 2019.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Ashlee Duprey, and against the defaulted defendants Anna Kihagi, a/k/a Anna Swain, and Nozari 2 LLC, as follows:

Special Damages - $750,000.00.
General Damages - $500,000.00.
Punitive Damages - $1,000,000.00.
Attorney Fees - $12,800.00.
Costs - $495.50.

Total - $2,263,295.50.

Counsel for plaintiff shall prepare the proposed Judgment and submit same to the Court for review and signature.
